home.headline: Applications in minutes
home.subline: Create your profile, paste a job listing – JobTRIX automatically generates your cover letter and CV.
home.freeBadge: First application completely free – no credit card required

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your details once – education, experience, qualifications.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Use the built-in job search or paste a job listing directly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: JobTRIX creates your cover letter and CV – ready to download.

features.pdfDesc: Classic, Modern, Traditional, Accent and Creative – for every occasion.

features.emailDesc: Ready to send – subject and body are generated automatically.
features.jobSearch: Job search via Federal Employment Agency

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.vatBody:
Tax number: 220/153/00012
Small business according to § 19 UStG – no VAT is charged.
impressum.disputeBody:
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: This privacy policy informs you which personal data is processed when using JobTRIX, for what purpose and on what legal basis.
datenschutz.responsibleBody:
Faltrix GbR
Am Schulberg 10
09569 Oederan
Email: faltrixgbr@gmail.com
Phone: +49 172 6071910
datenschutz.authBody:
We use NextAuth for registration and login. Your email address and a hashed password are stored. An authenticated session uses a session token.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
datenschutz.profileBody:
The data you enter in your profile (e.g. name, address, education, work experience, qualifications, interests and photo) is stored to generate your application documents.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
datenschutz.aiBody:
To generate cover letters and resumes, your profile data and the job posting are sent to the Anthropic Claude API (Anthropic PBC, San Francisco, USA). The data is only used to process your request.

Third-country transfer: USA. Transfer mechanism: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) pursuant to Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR. Anthropic does not train on API customer data.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
datenschutz.jobSearchBody:
For the job search including radius search we use the job search API of the German Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit). Your search terms and location data are sent to this API. No personal data is transmitted.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
datenschutz.paymentBody:
Payments for paid packages are processed via Stripe (Stripe Inc., USA). Payment data (credit card, bank details) is processed directly by Stripe and is not stored by us. We only store a Stripe reference ID.

Third-country transfer: USA. Transfer mechanism: EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF). Stripe is DPF-certified.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
datenschutz.emailBody:
We use the email service provider Resend (Resend Inc., USA) to send application emails as well as account-related emails (e.g. password reset).

Third-country transfer: USA. Transfer mechanism: EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF). Resend is DPF-certified.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract) for application emails; Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest: account security) for password reset.
datenschutz.hostingBody:
The app is hosted on Render (Render Inc., USA) servers in the EU region Frankfurt. The database is operated by Supabase (Supabase Inc., USA) in the EU region. DNS, CDN and WAF are provided via Cloudflare (Cloudflare Inc., USA) using a global edge network; Cloudflare does not permanently store any content data.

Third-country transfer: Servers are located in the EU, but providers are US companies. Transfer mechanism: EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF).

Data processing agreements (DPA) in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR are in place with all service providers.
datenschutz.auditBody:
To ensure IT security, we log security-relevant actions (e.g. failed logins, account deletions, payment transactions). The action, timestamp and IP address are stored. Logs are automatically deleted after 90 days.

Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest: IT security and abuse detection).
datenschutz.retentionBody: Your profile and application data is stored as long as your account exists. Audit logs are deleted after 90 days. Anonymized payment records are retained for up to 10 years in accordance with tax retention obligations (§ 147 AO).
datenschutz.rightsBody:
You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

• Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): You can request information about your stored data.
• Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You can request correction of inaccurate data.
• Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): You can request deletion of your data.
• Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR): You can request restriction of processing.
• Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You can receive your data in a machine-readable format.
• Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR): You can object to processing based on legitimate interests.

In the "Account & Privacy" section of your profile you can download your data (JSON export) or delete your account at any time. For further requests, contact us at faltrixgbr@gmail.com.
datenschutz.complaintBody:
You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority:

Saxon Data Protection and Transparency Commissioner
Devrientstraße 1
01067 Dresden, Germany
Phone: +49 351 85471 101
https://www.datenschutz.sachsen.de
datenschutz.cookiesBody:
We use only technically necessary cookies (e.g. for your login session and language preference). No tracking takes place, so no cookie consent banner is required.

Legal basis: § 25(2)(2) TDDDG (technically necessary).

agb.title: Terms and Conditions
agb.subjectBody: JobTRIX provides AI-powered creation of individual application documents (cover letter and resume) based on the profile data you provide and a job posting.
agb.packagesBody: After a free trial generation, a limited-time package with unlimited generations for a fixed period, as well as a lifetime package with permanent access including all future updates, are available. Current prices and durations can be found on the "Pricing" page.
agb.paymentBody: Payment processing for paid packages is handled by the payment provider Stripe via credit card or SEPA direct debit. By completing the purchase, you enter into a payment obligation towards JobTRIX.
agb.withdrawalBody: As the generated application documents are digital content not delivered on a physical medium, your statutory right of withdrawal expires prematurely as soon as JobTRIX has begun performing the contract and you have expressly consented to this early performance and confirmed your awareness of the resulting loss of the right of withdrawal.
agb.liabilityBody: Content created using AI is generated automatically based on your input. No guarantee is given as to the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of the generated content for any particular purpose. You are required to review the generated content yourself before use and adjust it if necessary.
agb.usageRightsBody: You may use, edit, and distribute the application documents created with your account without restriction for your own application purposes.
agb.termsBody: [Placeholder: Details on the contract term, termination options, changes to these Terms, and the applicable law will follow in a later phase]

help.title: Help
help.applicationQuestion: How do I create an application?
help.applicationAnswer: First, create your profile. Then use the job search to find a suitable position or insert a job posting manually. JobTRIX then generates your cover letter and resume, which you can download as a PDF or send directly by email.
help.packagesQuestion: What packages are available and what do they cost?
help.packagesAnswer: You get one free trial generation. After that, a limited-time package and a lifetime package are available. Current prices and durations can be found on the "Pricing" page.
help.jobSearchQuestion: How does the job search including radius search work?
help.jobSearchAnswer: The job search lets you search for job postings from the German Federal Employment Agency. With the radius search, you can also specify a location and a radius to find jobs near you.
help.layoutQuestion: How do I change the PDF layout, resume style, and dark mode?
help.layoutAnswer: In the generation form, you can select the PDF layout and resume style. You can toggle dark mode using the switch in the header.
help.accountQuestion: How do I export my data or delete my account?
help.accountAnswer: In the "Account & Privacy" section of your profile, you can download your data or delete your account.
help.supportAnswer: If you have questions, you can reach us by email at [Placeholder: support@example.com].
